description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical bottle with a long neck and a slightly rounded shoulder, finished with a cap. The bottle is primarily a matte silver or light gray color, with a large, black label wrapping around its body. The label features bold, yellow and white graphics, including stylized cows, fences, a person, and various farm-related icons, as well as prominent text. The cap appears to be integrated and matches the color of the bottle body. The bottle's surface is smooth and hard, with no visible signs of damage or wear. The overall design suggests it is a specialty or branded beverage bottle, likely intended for display or consumption in urban environments.
description: A tall, matte silver bottle with a long neck and a black label featuring yellow and white farm-themed graphics and bold text. The bottle has a smooth, hard surface and a matching cap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with farm-themed graphics, cows, and a person, as well as a section of bold text near the bottom.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the curvature of the bottle and the continuation of the black label around the body.
description_view_2: Top-down view focusing on the cap and neck, with the label's edge and bottle's cylindrical shape visible.
description_view_3: Rotated view displaying the bold text 'GRANDMONT' on the label and more of the label's design elements.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large black label with yellow and white graphics of cows, fences, a person, and bold text 'GRANDMONT' in uppercase letters; additional smaller text in yellow at the bottom.
